repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Library Acquisitions Department records
did.physdesc: Correspondence, accession volumes, fund books, and a catalog.
did.abstract: The Cornell University Library Acquisitions Department records contains departmental records dating 1874-1994. The collection includes correspondence, accession volumes, memoranda, budgets/fund books, and Technical Services records.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: See also Cornell University Libraries Acquisitions Department Records, #13-3-1086.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Library Acquisitions Department records, #13-3-705. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: The Cornell University Library Acquisitions Department records contains departmental records dating 1874-1994. The collection includes accession volumes, memoranda, budgets/fund books, and Technical Services records. The collection also contains correspondence, including a sub-series of correspondence from Acquisitions Librarian Arthur P. Sweet and Felix Reichmann, the Assistant Director for Development of Collections, as well as correspondence between the Department and various book dealers and publishers. Accession volumes include Andrew Dickson White's personal library, 1881-1891 (vol. 3), Zarncke Library, 1893-1899 (vol. 11), Thurston Collection, 1905 (vol. 24), Barnes Collection, 1913-1947 (vols. 49-50), Comstock Library, 1914-1947 (vols. 52-53), Goldwin Smith Library, 1907-1947 (vols. 54-56); Wason Collection, 1918-1947 (vols. 63-64); Dante Collection, 1907-1947 (vols. 66-67); Petrarch Collection, 1907-1943 (vol. 65); and Maps, 1898-1946 (vols. 87-88) Also, Chemistry Library accession books (7 vols., 1927-1962); Latin Seminary accession book, (1892-1914); and catalog of the Franz Bopp collection.

unittitle.extref: Link to a copy of the printed finding aid. Seachable PDF.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Papers used in preparation for July 1950 report.
